samples.title: Error-bar scatter plot
samples.description: Plots x/y points with both x and y error bars using an explicit data-column order.

samples.title: Symbol showcase with duplex font
samples.description: Shows multiple symbol codes in one scatter plot with duplex font enabled.

samples.title: Basic join plot
samples.description: Connects numeric points with a line using the join command.

samples.title: Basic histogram
samples.description: Draws a simple histogram from point-like x/y input pairs.

samples.title: Function plotting with expressions
samples.description: Plots analytic functions by sweeping x values and computing y expressions before joining the result.

samples.title: Titles and text placement
samples.description: Demonstrates top, bottom, left, right, text-coordinate, and data-coordinate title placement.

samples.title: Tick and scale tuning
samples.description: Uses window splits, tick sizing, and axis scale controls to compare tick and label density.

samples.title: Manual label placement
samples.description: Turns axis labels on and off and recreates selected axis labels with explicit title commands.

samples.title: Multi-window layout
samples.description: Builds a multi-panel page layout by dividing the drawing area into window regions and plotting into each one.

samples.title: Polar plot layout
samples.description: Demonstrates polar plotting combined with windows, limits, titles, and CASE annotations.
